title: Arrest Scenario
description: Short CCTV clip showing arrest situation
explanation: This scenario clearly depicts law enforcement officers taking a suspect into custody. The presence of uniforms and the use of handcuffs are key indicators.

title: Store Robbery
description: Footage from a convenience store showing an armed robbery.
explanation: The suspect is seen brandishing a weapon and demanding money from the cashier. This is a high-priority abnormal event.

title: Street Fight
description: Surveillance video of two individuals engaged in a physical altercation.
explanation: Rapid, aggressive movements and physical contact between individuals indicate a fight. Early detection can prevent serious injury.
